T041.result_summary: Added README.md covering setup, scripts, architecture overview, links to specs

T042.result_summary: Booted the real (non-test) server against local Postgres and hit real HTTP endpoints: GET verify handshake (200 correct token / 403 wrong token), POST missing-signature (401), POST unrecognized sender (200, silently ignored, no OpenAI call), POST authorized+activated (reached OpenAI boundary, 500 due to dummy API key as expected). Full live validation against real Meta/OpenAI requires credentials not available in this environment -- documented in quickstart.md.

T043.result_summary: Added Dockerfile (multi-stage, Alpine + openssl for Prisma's query engine), .dockerignore, .github/workflows/ci.yml (postgres service, lint+test gate). Docker build+run verified locally; caught and fixed a real missing-libssl runtime bug.
